verses.latin_vulgate: Respondens autem Sophar Naamathites, dixit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭יַּעַן צֹפַ֥ר הַֽנַּעֲמָתִ֗י וַיֹּאמַֽר׃
verses.king_james: Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said,

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco cogitationes meæ variæ succedunt sibi,  et mens in diversa rapitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֭כֵן שְׂעִפַּ֣י יְשִׁיב֑וּנִי וּ֝בַעֲב֗וּר ח֣וּשִׁי בִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Therefore do my thoughts cause me to answer, and for this I make haste.

verses.latin_vulgate: Doctrinam qua me arguis audiam,  et spiritus intelligentiæ meæ respondebit mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מוּסַ֣ר כְּלִמָּתִ֣י אֶשְׁמָ֑ע וְ֝ר֗וּחַ מִֽבִּינָתִ֥י יַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: I have heard the check of my reproach, and the spirit of my understanding causeth me to answer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc scio a principio,  ex quo positus est homo super terram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲזֹ֣את יָ֭דַעְתָּ מִנִּי־עַ֑ד מִנִּ֤י שִׂ֖ים אָדָ֣ם עֲלֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Knowest thou not this of old, since man was placed upon earth,

verses.latin_vulgate: quod laus impiorum brevis sit,  et gaudium hypocritæ ad instar puncti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י רִנְנַ֣ת רְ֭שָׁעִים מִקָּר֑וֹב וְשִׂמְחַ֖ת חָנֵ֣ף עֲדֵי־רָֽגַע׃
verses.king_james: That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the hypocrite but for a moment?

verses.latin_vulgate: Si ascenderit usque ad cælum superbia ejus,  et caput ejus nubes tetigerit,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יַעֲלֶ֣ה לַשָּׁמַ֣יִם שִׂיא֑וֹ וְ֝רֹאשׁ֗וֹ לָעָ֥ב יַגִּֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds;

verses.latin_vulgate: quasi sterquilinium in fine perdetur,  et qui eum viderant, dicent : Ubi est ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּֽ֭גֶלְלוֹ לָנֶ֣צַח יֹאבֵ֑ד רֹ֝אָ֗יו יֹאמְר֥וּ אַיּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung: they which have seen him shall say, Where is he?

verses.latin_vulgate: Velut somnium avolans non invenietur :  transiet sicut visio nocturna.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּחֲל֣וֹם יָ֭עוּף וְלֹ֣א יִמְצָא֑וּהוּ וְ֝יֻדַּ֗ד כְּחֶזְי֥וֹן לָֽיְלָה׃
verses.king_james: He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found: yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculus qui eum viderat non videbit,  neque ultra intuebitur eum locus suus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֣יִן שְׁ֭זָפַתּוּ וְלֹ֣א תוֹסִ֑יף וְלֹֽא־ע֝֗וֹד תְּשׁוּרֶ֥נּוּ מְקוֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The eye also which saw him shall see him no more; neither shall his place any more behold him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii ejus atterentur egestate,  et manus illius reddent ei dolorem suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֭נָיו יְרַצּ֣וּ דַלִּ֑ים וְ֝יָדָ֗יו תָּשֵׁ֥בְנָה אוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: His children shall seek to please the poor, and his hands shall restore their goods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ossa ejus implebuntur vitiis adolescentiæ ejus,  et cum eo in pulvere dormient.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֭צְמוֹתָיו מָלְא֣וּ עֲלוּמָ֑ו וְ֝עִמּ֗וֹ עַל־עָפָ֥ר תִּשְׁכָּֽב׃
verses.king_james: His bones are full of the sin of his youth, which shall lie down with him in the dust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum enim dulce fuerit in ore ejus malum,  abscondet illud sub lingua sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־תַּמְתִּ֣יק בְּפִ֣יו רָעָ֑ה יַ֝כְחִידֶ֗נָּה תַּ֣חַת לְשֹׁנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue;

verses.latin_vulgate: Parcet illi, et non derelinquet illud,  et celabit in gutture suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַחְמֹ֣ל עָ֭לֶיהָ וְלֹ֣א יַעַזְבֶ֑נָּה וְ֝יִמְנָעֶ֗נָּה בְּת֣וֹךְ חִכּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Though he spare it, and forsake it not; but keep it still within his mouth:

verses.latin_vulgate: Panis ejus in utero illius  vertetur in fel aspidum intrinsecus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַ֭חְמוֹ בְּמֵעָ֣יו נֶהְפָּ֑ךְ מְרוֹרַ֖ת פְּתָנִ֣ים בְּקִרְבּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Yet his meat in his bowels is turned, it is the gall of asps within him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Divitias quas devoravit evomet,  et de ventre illius extrahet eas Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַ֣יִל בָּ֭לַע וַיְקִאֶ֑נּוּ מִ֝בִּטְנ֗וֹ יֹרִשֶׁ֥נּוּ אֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again: God shall cast them out of his belly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Caput aspidum suget,  et occidet eum lingua viperæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹאשׁ־פְּתָנִ֥ים יִינָ֑ק תַּ֝הַרְגֵ֗הוּ לְשׁ֣וֹן אֶפְעֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: He shall suck the poison of asps: the viper’s tongue shall slay him.

verses.latin_vulgate: (Non videat rivulos fluminis,  torrentes mellis et butyri.)
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־יֵ֥רֶא בִפְלַגּ֑וֹת נַהֲרֵ֥י נַ֝חֲלֵ֗י דְּבַ֣שׁ וְחֶמְאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: He shall not see the rivers, the floods, the brooks of honey and butter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Luet quæ fecit omnia, nec tamen consumetur :  juxta multitudinem adinventionum suarum, sic et sustinebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵשִׁ֣יב יָ֭גָע וְלֹ֣א יִבְלָ֑ע כְּחֵ֥יל תְּ֝מוּרָת֗וֹ וְלֹ֣א יַעֲלֹֽס׃
verses.king_james: That which he laboured for shall he restore, and shall not swallow it down: according to his substance shall the restitution be, and he shall not rejoice therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam confringens nudavit pauperes :  domum rapuit, et non ædificavit eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־רִ֭צַּץ עָזַ֣ב דַּלִּ֑ים בַּ֥יִת גָּ֝זַ֗ל וְלֹ֣א יִבְנֵֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Because he hath oppressed and hath forsaken the poor; because he hath violently taken away an house which he builded not;

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec est satiatus venter ejus :  et cum habuerit quæ concupierat, possidere non poterit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־יָדַ֣ע שָׁלֵ֣ו בְּבִטְנ֑וֹ בַּ֝חֲמוּד֗וֹ לֹ֣א יְמַלֵּֽט׃
verses.king_james: Surely he shall not feel quietness in his belly, he shall not save of that which he desired.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non remansit de cibo ejus,  et propterea nihil permanebit de bonis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵין־שָׂרִ֥יד לְאׇכְל֑וֹ עַל־כֵּ֝֗ן לֹא־יָחִ֥יל טוּבֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: There shall none of his meat be left; therefore shall no man look for his goods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum satiatus fuerit, arctabitur :  æstuabit, et omnis dolor irruet super eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּמְלֹ֣אות שִׂ֭פְקוֹ יֵ֣צֶר ל֑וֹ כׇּל־יַ֖ד עָמֵ֣ל תְּבֹאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits: every hand of the wicked shall come upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Utinam impleatur venter ejus,  ut emittat in eum iram furoris sui,  et pluat super illum bellum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֤י ׀ לְמַלֵּ֬א בִטְנ֗וֹ יְֽשַׁלַּח־בּ֭וֹ חֲר֣וֹן אַפּ֑וֹ וְיַמְטֵ֥ר עָ֝לֵ֗ימוֹ בִּלְחוּמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: When he is about to fill his belly, God shall cast the fury of his wrath upon him, and shall rain it upon him while he is eating.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fugiet arma ferrea,  et irruet in arcum æreum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭בְרַח מִנֵּ֣שֶׁק בַּרְזֶ֑ל תַּ֝חְלְפֵ֗הוּ קֶ֣שֶׁת נְחוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: He shall flee from the iron weapon, and the bow of steel shall strike him through.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eductus, et egrediens de vagina sua,  et fulgurans in amaritudine sua :  vadent et venient super eum horribiles.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁלַף֮ וַיֵּצֵ֢א מִגֵּ֫וָ֥ה וּ֭בָרָק מִֽמְּרֹרָת֥וֹ יַהֲלֹ֗ךְ עָלָ֥יו אֵמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: It is drawn, and cometh out of the body; yea, the glittering sword cometh out of his gall: terrors are upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes tenebræ absconditæ sunt in occultis ejus ;  devorabit eum ignis qui non succenditur :  affligetur relictus in tabernaculo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־חֹשֶׁךְ֮ טָמ֢וּן לִצְפּ֫וּנָ֥יו תְּ֭אׇכְלֵהוּ אֵ֣שׁ לֹא־נֻפָּ֑ח יֵ֖רַע שָׂרִ֣יד בְּאׇהֳלֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: All darkness shall be hid in his secret places: a fire not blown shall consume him; it shall go ill with him that is left in his tabernacle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Revelabunt cæli iniquitatem ejus,  et terra consurget adversus eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְגַלּ֣וּ שָׁמַ֣יִם עֲוֺנ֑וֹ וְ֝אֶ֗רֶץ מִתְקוֹמָ֘מָ֥ה לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The heaven shall reveal his iniquity; and the earth shall rise up against him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apertum erit germen domus illius :  detrahetur in die furoris Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭גֶל יְב֣וּל בֵּית֑וֹ נִ֝גָּר֗וֹת בְּי֣וֹם אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The increase of his house shall depart, and his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est pars hominis impii a Deo,  et hæreditas verborum ejus a Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֤ה ׀ חֵלֶק־אָדָ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע מֵאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְנַחֲלַ֖ת אִמְר֣וֹ מֵאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: This is the portion of a wicked man from God, and the heritage appointed unto him by God.
